text.title: Usability Test Session Tracker Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Usability Test Session Tracker Template methodology end-to-end.

step.name: check-preconditions
step.input: The "Applies If" + "Skip If" lists from AGENTS.md.
step.action: Verify every Applies-If item holds AND no Skip-If item triggers.
step.output: Boolean: methodology applies / does not apply.
step.decision-gate: If preconditions fail, emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and STOP.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Read each input; attach its path/URL to the working artefact. Refuse to proceed if any input is unreachable.
step.decision-gate: If any input is unreachable, halt and request the source before proceeding.

step.name: apply-rules
step.input: Inputs gathered + the rules from content/01-core-rules.xml.
step.action: Walk each rule in order; record per-rule pass/fail; capture the violating snippet on any fail.
step.decision-gate: If any HARD rule fails, repair the artefact or escalate; do not return a partially-conformant output.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.input: Rule-conformant inputs + the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.
step.action: Fill the template under `templates/usability-test-session-tracker-template.json` according to the schema.

step.name: validate-and-handover
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-usability-test-session-tracker-template.py --file <path>`. Fix any reported violations. Send to named owner for sign-off.
step.output: Owner-signed artefact registered with the downstream consumer.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, do not hand over — repair and re-validate.
